subject: docs(claude): add Triggers section with 10 analysis triggers and aliases
body:
Adds a Triggers section between Prohibitions and Suggested Implementations
with 10 single-word commands (review, audit, docs, mobile, clean, performance,
security, debug, improve, start) plus short aliases. The start/go trigger
runs all 9 others sequentially with fix/skip/stop flow control. Also adds
prohibition against interactive input prompts (use numbered text instead).

Tags: documentation, triggers, workflow
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: ai-workflow
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Fiz1KNxyFbRCsz2e3YvBGt
